title: Limits and Colimits as Depth Operations

analysis.object: T693: Limits and Colimits as Depth Operations depth analysis

limits_preserve.description: Limits (product, pullback, equalizer): preserve depth; Deltad=0
limits_preserve.reason: Limits are Deltad=0: constraining operations; depth-preserving universal constructions

colimits_increment.description: Colimits (coproduct, pushout, coequalizer): increment depth; Deltad=+1
colimits_increment.reason: Colimits are Deltad=+1: constructive operations; building new structure increments depth

construction_increases.description: Constructing increases depth; constraining preserves it; explains complexity growth
construction_increases.reason: Depth theorem: colimits (construction) increase complexity; limits (constraint) do not; this is why math gets harder

analysis.theorem: T693: Limits and Colimits as Depth Operations (S972).

key_theorem: T693: Limits and Colimits as Depth Operations (S972).
